stemHtml: You are flying an ILS approach in IMC conditions when the Glide Path (GP) signal is lost. What will you do?

options.a: Maintain the current vertical speed, and continue descending until the ILS minima.
options.b: If time permits, revert to the published LOC approach procedure, or go around.
options.c: Continue down until the standby GP transmitter on the ground takes over.
options.d: It is mandatory to perform a missed approach if the GP signal fails.
